_provenance: Canonical transformations are claim-categories competitors ASSERT, not validated customer transformations — true transformation is a later VOC/review-mine finding.
_comparable_bet_seed_note: Brands tagged comparable_bet_seed:true (arduboy, flipper-zero, nothing-phone, skeleton-key) are BET-EVIDENCE — they demonstrate 'novel-hardware-as-lead bet won durably at scale.' Their brand counts are EXCLUDED from per-cell saturation exactly as dead/region-only brands are excluded from live saturation (D-08). Two jobs kept separate: they prove the bet, not the cell.

mechanisms_in_play.canonical: Distinctive low-res / monochrome / pixel display as the medium
raw_variants: very special black and white screen — not backlit, but super reflective
LED pixel art display (Pixoo, Ditoo, Times Gate)

mechanisms_in_play.canonical: Code-the-hardware-yourself / built-in dev toolchain (Arduino-compatible SDK + editors)
raw_variants: MicroPython implementation of Python 3 optimized to run on microcontrollers
built-in sprite, map, sound, music editors
all creative tools built into the console (code, music, sound, sprites, maps)

mechanisms_in_play.canonical: Built-in synth/sequencer/drum-machine engine
raw_variants: deep bass line synthesizer with sequencer

mechanisms_in_play.canonical: Cartridge-based game library / one-cart-fits-all compatibility
raw_variants: compatible with the 2,780+ Game Boy, Game Boy Color & Game Boy Advance game cartridge library
cartridge adapters for Game Gear, Neo Geo Pocket Color, TurboGrafx-16, Atari Lynx
The biggest collection of classic, licensed video game cartridges

mechanisms_in_play.canonical: Online cartridge/community browser for sharing creations
raw_variants: community of pixel artists, makers, desk setup lovers

mechanisms_in_play.canonical: RP2040 / Raspberry Pi single-board-computer core
raw_variants: running on a Raspberry Pi Zero W

mechanisms_in_play.canonical: Runs existing game engines / emulation core (PICO-8, LOVE2D, etc.)
raw_variants: runs PICO-8, LOVE2D, PyGame, Libretro and other game engines

mechanisms_in_play.canonical: App-controlled animations / pixel-art creation
raw_variants: app-controlled animations and pixel art creation

mechanisms_in_play.canonical: Caseless single-PCB design — cost savings reinvested in components
raw_variants: designed on a single multiple-layer circuit board using high quality components
no need for an outer case — by saving this cost, high quality components could be used to guarantee the best possible sound
single PCB design with no case — cost savings passed on

mechanisms_in_play.canonical: FPGA-based hardware-accurate (not emulated)
Long battery life
Modder-grade display upgrade for retro shells (Game Boy IPS swap)
raw_variants: modern look with this new FunnyPlaying display

mechanisms_in_play.canonical: Novel analog input device (crank / flip-out controller)
raw_variants: an analog controller that flips out from the side

mechanisms_in_play.canonical: On-device AI agent that learns from its environment
raw_variants: learns from its surrounding WiFi environment

mechanisms_in_play.canonical: Preloaded games / cartridge library ship-with-content (play right away)
Premium high-density display / build materials (high ppi LCD, Gorilla Glass)
Quad-core / multi-part modular dev board (swappable kit assembly)
raw_variants: ClockworkPi development board (Quad-core Cortex-A7 CPU, Mali GPU, WiFi & Bluetooth, 1GB DDR3)

claims.text: Playdate is familiar, but unlike anything you've ever seen
Bring personality, widgets and pixel visuals into your workspace
a wall of sound in your pocket.
pocket operators are small, ultra-portable music devices, with studio quality sound and the flexibility to make music on the go. affordable for everyone and compatible with all other music gear.

combos._note: Nothing Phone excluded (comparable_bet_seed). 'pocket operators are small, ultra-portable...studio quality sound' typed enlarged: specifies quality level (studio quality) and condition (on the go). 'affordable for everyone' adds comparative framing.
